    Index

    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

    A

    addWorkout(Workout) - Method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.logic.WorkoutLog
    Adds a workout to the log.

    D

    DataStorage - Class in hr.unizd.workoutlog.logic
    Handles reading and writing workout data to the file system.

    E

    export(List) - Static method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.logic.DataStorage
    Exports all workouts to a plain text file, one workout per line.

    G

    getCardioCount() - Method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.logic.WorkoutLog
    Returns the number of workouts that include a cardio component.
    getDayOfWeek() - Method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.model.Workout
    Returns the day of the week when the workout took place.
    getDisplayName() - Method in enum class hr.unizd.workoutlog.model.Intensity
    Returns the human-readable name of this intensity level.
    getDurationMinutes() - Method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.model.Workout
    Returns the duration of the workout in minutes.
    getExerciseName() - Method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.model.Workout
    Returns the name of the exercise.
    getIntensity() - Method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.model.Workout
    Returns the intensity level of the workout.
    getNote() - Method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.model.Workout
    Returns the optional note attached to this workout.
    getStrengthCount() - Method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.logic.WorkoutLog
    Returns the number of workouts that include a strength component.
    getTotalCount() - Method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.logic.WorkoutLog
    Returns the total number of workouts in the log.
    getTotalMinutes() - Method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.logic.WorkoutLog
    Returns the sum of durations of all workouts in minutes.
    getWorkouts() - Method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.logic.WorkoutLog
    Returns the list of all recorded workouts.

    H

    HARD - Enum constant in enum class hr.unizd.workoutlog.model.Intensity
    High-effort workout requiring maximum exertion.
    hr.unizd.workoutlog - package hr.unizd.workoutlog
     
    hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui - package hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui
     
    hr.unizd.workoutlog.logic - package hr.unizd.workoutlog.logic
     
    hr.unizd.workoutlog.model - package hr.unizd.workoutlog.model
     

    I

    Intensity - Enum Class in hr.unizd.workoutlog.model
    Represents the intensity level of a workout.
    InvalidInputException - Exception Class in hr.unizd.workoutlog.logic
    Thrown when the user provides invalid input when adding a workout.
    InvalidInputException(String) - Constructor for exception class hr.unizd.workoutlog.logic.InvalidInputException
    Creates a new InvalidInputException with the given error message.
    isCardio() - Method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.model.Workout
    Returns whether this workout includes a cardio component.
    isStrength() - Method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.model.Workout
    Returns whether this workout includes a strength component.

    L

    LIGHT - Enum constant in enum class hr.unizd.workoutlog.model.Intensity
    Low-effort workout, suitable for warm-up or recovery sessions.
    load() - Static method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.logic.DataStorage
    Loads the list of workouts from the binary file.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.Main
    Starts the application.
    Main - Class in hr.unizd.workoutlog
    Entry point of the WorkoutLog application.
    MainWindow - Class in hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui
    The main application window of WorkoutLog.
    MainWindow(WorkoutLog) - Constructor for class hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui.MainWindow
    Creates and displays the main application window.
    MEDIUM - Enum constant in enum class hr.unizd.workoutlog.model.Intensity
    Moderate-effort workout, the most common training level.

    R

    removeWorkout(int) - Method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.logic.WorkoutLog
    Removes the workout at the specified position in the list.

    S

    save(List) - Static method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.logic.DataStorage
    Saves the list of workouts to a binary file using Java serialization.

    T

    toString() - Method in enum class hr.unizd.workoutlog.model.Intensity
    Returns the display name, so that an Intensity value can be placed directly into a JComboBox or printed without extra code.
    toString() - Method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.model.Workout
    Returns a concise, human-readable summary of this workout.

    V

    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class hr.unizd.workoutlog.model.Intensity
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    values() - Static method in enum class hr.unizd.workoutlog.model.Intensity
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

    W

    Workout - Class in hr.unizd.workoutlog.model
    Represents a single workout entry in the WorkoutLog application.
    Workout(String, int, String, Intensity, boolean, boolean, String) - Constructor for class hr.unizd.workoutlog.model.Workout
    Creates a new Workout with all required information.
    WorkoutLog - Class in hr.unizd.workoutlog.logic
    Manages the list of all recorded workouts.
    WorkoutLog() - Constructor for class hr.unizd.workoutlog.logic.WorkoutLog
    Creates a new, empty WorkoutLog.
